message:
Split build and test into separate steps

The Build step now uses the `.unchecked` attribute to build without
testing, while the Test step reuses the artifact and runs tests. This
improves CI efficiency by enabling artifact reuse when tests fail.


Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -124,6 +124,17 @@ jobs:
       # =========================================================================
       - name: Build
         id: build
+        env:
+          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_BOT_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+        run: |
+          release_flag=""
+          if [[ "${{ github.event_name }}" == "release" ]]; then
+            release_flag="--release"
+          fi
+          nix-shell -p git \
+            --run "python3 .github/workflows/nix-build.py build --attribute ${{ inputs.attribute }}.unchecked $release_flag"
+      - name: Test
         env:
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
           GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_BOT_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
